objective: Make bilig decisively better than Google Sheets and Microsoft Excel, targeting at least 10x superiority across major spreadsheet/workbook categories.

overallGoogleSheets10xStatus.requirement: A broad Google Sheets 10x claim is allowed only when every claimed performance category has checked-in live Google Sheets evidence and every required mean and p95 ratio is at least 10x better.

categories.requirement: Every claimed recalculation workload must prove at least 10x better mean and p95 than live Google Sheets.
Every claimed structural-edit workload must prove at least 10x better mean and p95 than live Google Sheets.
Every claimed large-workbook workload must prove at least 10x better mean and p95 than live Google Sheets.
Claimed UI responsiveness must have live same-corpus browser proof against Google Sheets with 10x better mean and p95 plus rendered-grid proof.
evidence: direct live browser timing passed: true
gaps: live UI browser evidence is not a same-corpus 10x proof against Google Sheets with rendered-grid proof

unmetRequirements: ui-responsiveness: live UI browser evidence is not a same-corpus 10x proof against Google Sheets with rendered-grid proof

requiredForBlanketTenXClaim: Calculation correctness must cover the committed formula surface and match live Sheets and Excel required cases.
Recalculation speed must prove 10x mean and p95 wins against both live Sheets and live Excel required cases.
Structural edit performance must prove 10x mean and p95 wins against both live Sheets and live Excel required cases.
Large workbook scale must meet SLOs and prove 10x mean and p95 wins against both live Sheets and live Excel cases.
UI responsiveness must include live incumbent browser evidence and headed large-workbook frame-budget contracts.
Collaboration controls must pass with no uncovered generated controls.
Automation and API extensibility controls must pass with no uncovered generated controls.
Import/export compatibility must pass required cases and leave no unsupported feature required by the blanket claim.
Auditability controls must pass with no uncovered generated controls.
Reliability controls must pass with no uncovered generated controls.
Security controls must pass with no uncovered generated controls.
Operator workflow must preserve one-command verification and prevent unverifiable blanket claims.
unmetRequirements: ui-responsiveness: live UI browser evidence is not a same-corpus 10x proof against incumbents
ui-responsiveness: live UI browser evidence is not a same-corpus 10x proof against incumbents
